prose.en: Providers MAY execute significant changes (including transformative changes) during an emergency or incident without following the Significant Change Notification rules in advance. In such emergencies, providers MUST follow all relevant procedures, notify all necessary parties, retroactively provide all Significant Change Notification materials, and complete appropriate assessment after the incident.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: Procedures for emergency changes should be documented in the FedRAMP Certification Package.
